mapper.sql: l.id, l.student_id, l.leave_type, l.start_time, l.end_time, l.reason, l.leave_status, l.approver_id, l.approver_name, l.approve_time, l.approve_opinion, l.remark, l.deleted, l.create_time, l.update_time, sp.student_no, sp.chinese_name, sp.english_name, c.class_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO academic_leave_application (student_id, leave_type, start_time, end_time, reason, leave_status, remark) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{leaveType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{reason}, #{leaveStatus}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE academic_leave_application SET leave_status=#{leaveStatus}, approver_id=#{approverId}, approver_name=#{approverName}, approve_time=#{approveTime}, approve_opinion=#{approveOpinion}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM academic_leave_application l LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=l.student_id AND sp.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_student_record r ON r.student_id=l.student_id AND r.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_class c ON c.id=r.class_id AND c.deleted=0 WHERE l.id=#{id} AND l.deleted=0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM academic_leave_application l LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=l.student_id AND sp.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_student_record r ON r.student_id=l.student_id AND r.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_class c ON c.id=r.class_id AND c.deleted=0

SELECT FROM academic_leave_application l LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=l.student_id AND sp.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_student_record r ON r.student_id=l.student_id AND r.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_class c ON c.id=r.class_id AND c.deleted=0
ORDER BY l.create_time DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}

SELECT FROM academic_leave_application l LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id=l.student_id AND sp.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_student_record r ON r.student_id=l.student_id AND r.deleted=0 LEFT JOIN academic_class c ON c.id=r.class_id AND c.deleted=0 WHERE l.student_id=#{studentId} AND l.deleted=0 ORDER BY l.create_time DESC, l.id DESC
